Title: Relates to the resentencing of certain juvenile and adolescent offenders
Summary: Relates to the resentencing of certain juvenile and adolescent offenders who were convicted prior to October 1, 2018 for offenses not including, rape, sexual assault, murder in the first degree or aggravated murder.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the criminal procedure law, in relation to resentencing certain juvenile and adolescent offenders
